productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Dilute Blue Flip Flops
description: Walking in a puma Dilute flip flop feels like walking on cotton. To add oodles of style, team this flip-flop with casual denims and a comfort Fit T-shirt.UpperQuick-drying rubber upper for dry comfort for the feetThong twill tape construction to hold the forefoot in place, and for added comfort and styleMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfortColoured brand prints on the footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with round suction points all over for grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
